grid_systems.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6 gap-4 dense

buttons.primary: bg-gold text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-all shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,175,55,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-gold text-gold hover:bg-gold hover:text-black transition-all uppercase tracking-wider
buttons.emergency: bg-red-600 text-white border-2 border-red-500 animate-pulse hover:animate-none hover:bg-red-700 font-black uppercase tracking-widest

cards.feature: bg-zinc-900/50 border-l-2 border-gold/50 hover:border-gold p-6 transition-all group
cards.stat: bg-black border border-zinc-800 p-4 relative overflow-hidden

inputs.default: bg-zinc-950/50 border-zinc-800 focus:border-gold focus:ring-1 focus:ring-gold/50 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600

hero_background.alt: Dark luxury car bathed in golden light
hero_background.usage: Full screen hero background with overlay

abstract_gold.usage: Section dividers or subtle background textures

engine_scan.usage: Vehicle Scan Page placeholder and diagnostic report header

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px, Sharp edges where possible

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use transparent backgrounds for headers or overlays where content scrolls underneath. Always use 'bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md'.
All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links) MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case (e.g., 'submit-login', 'nav-dashboard').
NEVER use gradients for dark backgrounds. Use solid hex codes or noise textures.
Do not use generic 'Inter' font for headings. Use 'Rajdhani'.
Maintain 'Dark Mode Only' - do not implement light mode toggles.

landing_page.hero_section: Full viewport height (h-screen). Background image with heavy black gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-t from-black via-black/50 to-transparent). Headline centered, massive.
landing_page.features_grid: Use Bento Grid layout. Dark glass cards with gold icon accents.

dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (collapsible). Top bar with 'Emergency Stop' button visible at all times.
dashboard.charts: Use Recharts with custom tooltips. Colors: Gold for primary data, Dark Grey for secondary.
dashboard.scan_overlay: When scanning, overlay the entire screen with a grid animation and 'scanning' text in monospace font.

emergency_protocol.design: Stark contrast. Black background, flashing Red borders. All text in Red or White. Big, tactile buttons.

instructions_to_main_agent: Read this file first before writing any code.
For the 3D effect, use subtle CSS animations or 'framer-motion' instead of heavy Three.js unless absolutely necessary for performance.
Ensure all text meets WCAG AA contrast ratios against the dark backgrounds.
